Notice Of Hearing On Petition For Order Relieving Petitioner From Provisions Of Govt Code 945.4 & For An Order Permitting A Late Claim Against A Governmental Entity
Off Calendar Apr-07-2003 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: TIMOTHY G. TIETJEN, ESQ. OF ROUDA FEDER TIETJEN & ZANOBIN (415) 398-5398 FOR PLAINTIFF/MOVING PARTY DOUG BARKUS.
JOHN P. AUBREY, DEPUTY CITY ATTORNEY (415) 554-3968 FOR DEFENDANT/OPPOSING PARTY, CCSF.

RULING:
MATTER WAS ARGUED. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. PETITIONER DOUG BARKUS' Notice Of Hearing On Petition For Order Relieving Petitioner From Provisions Of Govt Code 945.4 & For An Order Permitting A Late Claim Against A Governmental Entity -- GRANTED. REPORTER: JOSEPH VICKSTEIN, CSR #4780 (DAG/301/DR)
